author: Disney YouTube
text:
D23 Inside Disney | Toy Story 5
We’re at Pixar to celebrate all things Toy Story 5! Tom Hanks (voice of Woody), Disney Legend Tim Allen (voice of Buzz), Joan Cusack (voice of Jessie), and Greta Lee (voice of Lilypad) share how it feels to be a part of Toy Story's legacy... now complete with new technology!
